                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      modules\objects\object_shelf_canvas_view.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Canvas‑based shelf view for object entities. This implementation focuses on fast drawing with a background image and category shelves that span the full width. It exposes the same minimal public API the app expects from the previous view: - is_available() -> bool - is_visible() -> bool - show(before_widget) - hide() - populate() - refresh_selection() - update_summary() - start_visibility_monitor()/stop_visibility_monitor() It draws only category shelves (not individual items) for performance and clarity; counts are shown per category. The background image is scaled to the canvas and shelves are drawn as semi‑transparent rounded panels so the background remains visible behind them.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        class _ShelfRow

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class ObjectShelfView

Parameters: event.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _update_detail_body_height(self, max_panel_height: int=150, min_body_height: int=40) – Adjust detail scroll area height based on content, capping total panel height. The overall detail panel should not exceed ``max_panel_height``. We compute available height for the scrollable body by subtracting the header height and known paddings, then clamp the body height to that. The scrollable frame itself is resized so it doesn't reserve unnecessary empty space. Parameters: max_panel_height (type int, default 150); min_body_height (type int, default 40).

Parameters: _event.

Parameters: w (type int); h (type int).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _get_shelf_image(self, width: int, height: int) – Cached wood-like plank image for shelf rows. Uses a simple warm gradient with subtle plank lines for a shelf look. Parameters: width (type int); height (type int). Returns: ImageTk.PhotoImage.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _get_crate_image(self, width: int, height: int) – Cached crate tile image for object items. Designed to be used as a single canvas image per item for speed. Parameters: width (type int); height (type int). Returns: ImageTk.PhotoImage.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _read_equipment_values(payload: dict) – Internal helper for read equipment values. Parameters: payload (type dict). Returns: dict.

Parameters: payload (type dict). Returns: dict.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _normalize_feats(payload: dict) – Normalize feats. Parameters: payload (type dict). Returns: list[dict].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • normalize_draft_payload_for_form(payload: dict) – Return a payload copy that always carries form-level equipment fields. Older drafts may contain only nested `equipment` dictionaries. The form inputs are still keyed by top-level fields (`weapon`, `armor`, etc.), so we mirror normalized values there before applying them to widgets. Parameters: payload (type dict). Returns: dict.

Parameters: enabled (type bool). Returns: None.

Parameters: master; scenario_name (keyword-only, type str); scenario_item (keyword-only, type dict); wrappers (keyword-only, type dict[str, object]); map_wrapper (keyword-only, type object).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                class GMScreenHandoutsPanel (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Show scenario-linked handouts in a compact clickable grid.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: int.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • create_note_frame(self, master=None, initial_text="") – Create note frame. Parameters: master (default None); initial_text (default "").
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _make_fullbleed(self, container: ctk.CTkFrame) – Force a container to match the visible area height/width. CTkScrollableFrame sizes its internal `_scrollable_frame` to content. For interactive canvases (map tool, world map, scene flow) we want to occupy all available space. This syncs the container size to the viewport on resize. Parameters: container (type ctk.CTkFrame).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • open_whiteboard_tab(self, title=None, activate=True) – Open a whiteboard tab within the GM screen. Parameters: title (default None); activate (default True).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      modules\scenarios\gm_table\desk_texture.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Theme-aware infinite desk texture utilities for the GM table.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • resolve_theme_texture_path(theme_key: str | None) – Return the desk texture path for the active theme when available. Parameters: theme_key (type str | None). Returns: Path | None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class InfiniteDeskTexture

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Draw and update a repeating desk texture anchored in world-space.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • __init__(self, canvas) – Parameters: canvas. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • load_theme(self, theme_key: str | None) – Load the texture for the requested theme. Parameters: theme_key (type str | None). Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • draw(self, *, width: int, height: int, camera_x: float, camera_y: float, zoom: float) – Draw tiled texture for the provided viewport/camera. Parameters: width (keyword-only, type int); height (keyword-only, type int); camera_x (keyword-only, type float); camera_y (keyword-only, type float); zoom (keyword-only, type float). Returns: bool.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\scenarios\gm_table\handouts\service.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Services for collecting scenario-specific player handouts.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • collect_scenario_handouts(scenario_item: dict, wrappers: Mapping[str, object], map_wrapper: object) – Collect valid handout images linked from a scenario. Resolution rules: - linked entity names are matched through normalized aliases - portrait-like fields are parsed with ``parse_portrait_value`` - map images are extracted from ``Image``/``image`` fields - results are deduplicated by normalized absolute path Parameters: scenario_item (type dict); wrappers (type Mapping[str, object]); map_wrapper (type object). Returns: list[HandoutItem].

Returns: list[dict].

Returns: dict[str, list[dict]].

Returns: str.

Returns: tuple[str, ...].

Returns: set[str].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _clamp(value: int, minimum: int, maximum: int) – Clamp a value. Parameters: value (type int); minimum (type int); maximum (type int). Returns: int.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _coerce_float(value, default: float=0.0) – Return a float with a safe fallback. Parameters: value; default (type float, default 0.0). Returns: float.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _normalize_camera(camera: dict | None=None) – Return a safe camera snapshot. Parameters: camera (type dict | None, default None). Returns: dict[str, float].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _normalize_bookmark(name: str, camera: dict | None=None) – Return a serializable bookmark payload. Parameters: name (type str); camera (type dict | None, default None). Returns: dict[str, object].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _snap(value: int, grid: int=24) – Snap a value to the nearest grid slot. Parameters: value (type int); grid (type int, default 24). Returns: int.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _normalize_floating_geometry(x: float | int, y: float | int, width: int, height: int, *, min_width: int, min_height: int) – Normalize a floating panel world geometry without clamping it to the viewport. Parameters: x (type float | int); y (type float | int); width (type int); height (type int); min_width (keyword-only, type int); min_height (keyword-only, type int). Returns: dict[str, float | int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _world_geometry_from_state(state: dict | None, *, default_x: float=24.0, default_y: float=24.0, default_width: int, default_height: int, min_width: int, min_height: int) – Resolve a saved floating geometry from world or legacy viewport-local fields. Parameters: state (type dict | None); default_x (keyword-only, type float, default 24.0); default_y (keyword-only, type float, default 24.0); default_width (keyword-only, type int); default_height (keyword-only, type int); min_width (keyword-only, type int); min_height (keyword-only, type int). Returns: dict[str, float | int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _surface_dimensions(surface, *, minimum_width: int=640, minimum_height: int=420) – Return safe surface dimensions. Parameters: surface; minimum_width (keyword-only, type int, default 640); minimum_height (keyword-only, type int, default 420). Returns: tuple[int, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _constrain_panel_geometry(x: int, y: int, width: int, height: int, *, surface_w: int, surface_h: int, min_width: int, min_height: int, margin: int=PANEL_MARGIN) – Clamp panel geometry so it stays visible inside the workspace. Parameters: x (type int); y (type int); width (type int); height (type int); surface_w (keyword-only, type int); surface_h (keyword-only, type int); min_width (keyword-only, type int); min_height (keyword-only, type int); margin (keyword-only, type int, default PANEL_MARGIN). Returns: dict[str, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _resolve_snap_mode(pointer_x: int, pointer_y: int, *, surface_w: int, surface_h: int, threshold: int=PANEL_SNAP_THRESHOLD) – Return the Windows-like snap target under the pointer. Parameters: pointer_x (type int); pointer_y (type int); surface_w (keyword-only, type int); surface_h (keyword-only, type int); threshold (keyword-only, type int, default PANEL_SNAP_THRESHOLD). Returns: str | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _snap_geometry(mode: str, *, surface_w: int, surface_h: int, min_width: int, min_height: int, margin: int=PANEL_MARGIN, gutter: int=PANEL_GUTTER) – Backward-compatible wrapper around :func:`fit_viewport_snap`. Parameters: mode (type str); surface_w (keyword-only, type int); surface_h (keyword-only, type int); min_width (keyword-only, type int); min_height (keyword-only, type int); margin (keyword-only, type int, default PANEL_MARGIN); gutter (keyword-only, type int, default PANEL_GUTTER). Returns: dict[str, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _resize_geometry(direction: str, *, start_geometry: dict[str, int], delta_x: int, delta_y: int, surface_w: int, surface_h: int, min_width: int, min_height: int, margin: int=PANEL_MARGIN) – Return resized panel geometry for an edge or corner drag. Parameters: direction (type str); start_geometry (keyword-only, type dict[str, int]); delta_x (keyword-only, type int); delta_y (keyword-only, type int); surface_w (keyword-only, type int); surface_h (keyword-only, type int); min_width (keyword-only, type int); min_height (keyword-only, type int); margin (keyword-only, type int, default PANEL_MARGIN). Returns: dict[str, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _resize_floating_geometry(direction: str, *, start_geometry: dict[str, float | int], delta_x: int, delta_y: int, zoom: float, min_width: int, min_height: int) – Return resized floating geometry without constraining it to the viewport. Parameters: direction (type str); start_geometry (keyword-only, type dict[str, float | int]); delta_x (keyword-only, type int); delta_y (keyword-only, type int); zoom (keyword-only, type float); min_width (keyword-only, type int); min_height (keyword-only, type int). Returns: dict[str, float | int].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    class PanelDefinition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Serializable GM Table panel description.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class GMTablePanel (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Floating panel with drag, resize, and window controls.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • __init__(self, master, *, definition: PanelDefinition, width: int, height: int, on_focus: Callable[[str], None], on_close: Callable[[str], None], on_geometry_changed: Callable[[str], None], project_floating_geometry: Callable[[dict[str, float | int]], dict[str, int]], screen_to_world: Callable[[float, float], tuple[float, float]], get_camera_zoom: Callable[[], float], on_snap_requested: Callable[[str, str], None], on_snap_preview_changed: Callable[[str, str | None], None], on_toggle_maximize: Callable[[str], None], on_window_action: Callable[[str, str], None]) – Parameters: master; definition (keyword-only, type PanelDefinition); width (keyword-only, type int); height (keyword-only, type int); on_focus (keyword-only, type Callable[[str], None]); on_close (keyword-only, type Callable[[str], None]); on_geometry_changed (keyword-only, type Callable[[str], None]); project_floating_geometry (keyword-only, type Callable[[dict[str, float | int]], dict[str, int]]); screen_to_world (keyword-only, type Callable[[float, float], tuple[float, float]]); get_camera_zoom (keyword-only, type Callable[[], float]); on_snap_requested (keyword-only, type Callable[[str, str], None]); on_snap_preview_changed (keyword-only, type Callable[[str, str | None], None]); on_toggle_maximize (keyword-only, type Callable[[str], None]); on_window_action (keyword-only, type Callable[[str, str], None]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _bind_focus(self, widget) – Raise the panel when clicked. Parameters: widget. Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _install_resize_bindings(self) – Enable drag-resize interactions. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _bind_resize_widget(self, widget, direction: str) – Bind a widget as an active resize target. Parameters: widget; direction (type str). Returns: None.

Returns: str.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • restore_layout(self, *, anchor_x_root: int | None=None, anchor_y_root: int | None=None) – Restore the last floating geometry from a snapped or maximized state. Parameters: anchor_x_root (keyword-only, type int | None, default None); anchor_y_root (keyword-only, type int | None, default None). Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • minimize(self) – Hide the panel and remember how it should restore. Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • clear_layout_mode(self) – Return to freeform mode without changing geometry. Returns: None.

Parameters: geometry (type dict[str, int]). Returns: None.

Parameters: geometry (type dict[str, float | int]); screen_geometry (keyword-only, type dict[str, int] | None, default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • serialize_layout_state(self) – Return panel layout metadata for persistence. Returns: dict[str, object].

Parameters: action (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _show_actions_menu(self) – Open the window actions menu. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _refresh_window_controls(self) – Refresh control labels for the current layout mode. Returns: None.

Parameters: event. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _drag_to(self, event) – Move the panel with the pointer. Parameters: event. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _stop_drag(self, event=None) – Stop dragging and snap to the workspace grid. Parameters: event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _toggle_maximize(self, _event=None) – Toggle maximized mode from the header. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _start_resize(self, event, direction: str="se") – Start resizing a panel. Parameters: event; direction (type str, default "se"). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _resize_to(self, event) – Resize the panel with the pointer. Parameters: event. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _stop_resize(self, _event=None) – Finish resizing and snap dimensions. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.

Parameters: focused (type bool). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • set_title(self, title: str) – Refresh the visible title. Parameters: title (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • geometry_snapshot(self) – Return the last known panel geometry. Returns: dict[str, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • floating_geometry_snapshot(self) – Return the persisted world geometry for floating restore/state. Returns: dict[str, float | int].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _set_size(self, width: int, height: int) – Update the CTk widget size. Parameters: width (type int); height (type int). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _resolve_drag_snap_mode(self, event) – Resolve the current drag pointer against the workspace snap map. Parameters: event. Returns: str | None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class GMTableWorkspace (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Manage floating GM Table panels.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • __init__(self, master, *, on_panel_build: Callable[[ctk.CTkFrame, PanelDefinition], object], on_layout_changed: Callable[[], None] | None=None) – Parameters: master; on_panel_build (keyword-only, type Callable[[ctk.CTkFrame, PanelDefinition], object]); on_layout_changed (keyword-only, type Callable[[], None] | None, default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _schedule_layout_changed(self) – Debounce layout persistence. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _flush_layout_changed(self) – Emit the debounced layout change callback. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _refresh_empty_state(self, _event=None) – Toggle the instructional overlay. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _minimized_panel_ids(self) – Return minimized panels in z-order. Returns: list[str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _refresh_minimized_tray(self) – Refresh the minimized panel tray. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _bind_surface_navigation(self) – Bind camera navigation to the empty table surface. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _bind_workspace_middle_pan(self) – Bind middle-button camera pan to the containing window. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _unbind_workspace_middle_pan(self) – Remove any middle-button pan bindings registered on the window. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _handle_workspace_destroy(self, event=None) – Release toplevel pan bindings when the workspace is destroyed. Parameters: event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _widget_is_in_surface_subtree(self, widget) – Return whether a widget belongs to this workspace surface. Parameters: widget. Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _camera_snapshot(self) – Return the current camera state. Returns: dict[str, float].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _set_camera(self, *, x: float | None=None, y: float | None=None, zoom: float | None=None) – Apply camera changes and refresh projected overlays. Parameters: x (keyword-only, type float | None, default None); y (keyword-only, type float | None, default None); zoom (keyword-only, type float | None, default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _camera_view_size(self) – Return the visible world-space viewport size. Returns: tuple[float, float].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _screen_to_world(self, screen_x: float, screen_y: float) – Convert viewport-local screen coordinates into world coordinates. Parameters: screen_x (type float); screen_y (type float). Returns: tuple[float, float].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _screen_geometry_to_world(self, geometry: dict[str, int]) – Convert a viewport geometry into floating world geometry. Parameters: geometry (type dict[str, int]). Returns: dict[str, float | int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _project_floating_geometry(self, geometry: dict[str, float | int]) – Project a floating world geometry into viewport coordinates. Parameters: geometry (type dict[str, float | int]). Returns: dict[str, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _floating_geometry_snapshot(self, panel) – Return a floating geometry from a real or fake panel. Parameters: panel. Returns: dict[str, float | int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _apply_floating_geometry(self, panel, geometry: dict[str, float | int]) – Apply a floating geometry to a real or fake panel. Parameters: panel; geometry (type dict[str, float | int]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _reproject_floating_panels(self) – Reproject floating panels through the current camera. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _refresh_desk_texture(self) – Render the active theme desk texture as an infinite tiled surface. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _refresh_navigation_hud(self) – Refresh camera affordances. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _refresh_minimap(self) – Redraw the desk minimap. Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _pin_snapped_panels_to_world(self) – Convert snapped panels into floating world-anchored panels. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _start_surface_pan(self, event) – Start panning the infinite desk. Parameters: event. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _pan_surface_to(self, event) – Pan the camera with the active drag gesture. Parameters: event. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _stop_surface_pan(self, _event=None) – Finish a camera pan gesture. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _zoom_surface(self, event) – Zoom the desk around the cursor position. Parameters: event.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _handle_home_shortcut(self, _event=None) – Return to the saved home view. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • list_bookmarks(self) – Return lightweight desk bookmarks. Returns: list[dict[str, object]].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • set_home_camera(self) – Set the current viewport as the workspace home. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • jump_home(self) – Return to the saved home camera. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • save_bookmark(self, name: str) – Create or update a named camera bookmark. Parameters: name (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • delete_bookmark(self, name: str) – Delete a bookmark by name. Parameters: name (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • jump_to_bookmark(self, name: str) – Jump to a stored camera bookmark. Parameters: name (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _prompt_bookmark_name(self) – Prompt for a bookmark name. Returns: str | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _save_bookmark_from_prompt(self) – Create or update a bookmark from a prompt. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _show_bookmark_menu(self) – Open the bookmark camera menu. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _on_minimap_click(self, event) – Recenter the viewport from the minimap. Parameters: event. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _on_surface_configure(self, _event=None) – Keep docked panels aligned when the workspace changes size. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _apply_focus_state(self, panel_id: str | None) – Refresh visual focus across all panels. Parameters: panel_id (type str | None). Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _visible_panel_ids(self) – Return visible panels in z-order. Returns: list[str].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _surface_geometry(self) – Return stable workspace dimensions.
