Parameters: kinds (keyword-only, type set[str] | None, default None); include_minimized (keyword-only, type bool, default False). Returns: str | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • get_panel_payload(self, panel_id: str) – Return the hosted payload for a panel.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       • get_panel_definition(self, panel_id: str) – Return a panel definition. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: PanelDefinition | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • bring_to_front(self, panel_id: str) – Focus a panel and raise it visually. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • remove_panel(self, panel_id: str) – Close a panel. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • clear(self) – Remove every panel. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • dispose(self) – Close every hosted payload without emitting more layout work. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • add_panel(self, definition: PanelDefinition, *, geometry: dict | None=None) – Create and place a new floating panel. Parameters: definition (type PanelDefinition); geometry (keyword-only, type dict | None, default None). Returns: GMTablePanel.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _mount_payload_widget(self, host: ctk.CTkFrame, payload: object) – Grid widget payloads that are returned directly by builders. Parameters: host (type ctk.CTkFrame); payload (type object). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • handle_window_action(self, panel_id: str, action: str) – Dispatch a panel window action. Parameters: panel_id (type str); action (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • preview_snap_target(self, panel_id: str, mode: str | None) – No-op: magnetic snap preview has been removed from GM Table. Parameters: panel_id (type str); mode (type str | None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • clear_snap_preview(self) – No-op: magnetic snap preview has been removed from GM Table. Returns: None.

Parameters: panel_id (type str); width (type int); height (type int). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • ensure_panel_minimum_size(self, panel_id: str, width: int, height: int) – Grow a panel only when it is below a readable minimum size. Parameters: panel_id (type str); width (type int); height (type int). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _suggest_position(self, *, width: int, height: int) – Return a cascading default position for a new panel. Parameters: width (keyword-only, type int); height (keyword-only, type int). Returns: dict[str, float | int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _find_snap_companion(self, panel_id: str) – Return the next visible panel that should pair with a snapped panel. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: str | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • minimize_panel(self, panel_id: str) – Minimize a panel into the workspace tray. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • restore_panel(self, panel_id: str, *, focus: bool=True) – Restore a minimized, snapped, or maximized panel. Parameters: panel_id (type str); focus (keyword-only, type bool, default True). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • restore_all_panels(self) – Restore every minimized panel. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • close_other_panels(self, panel_id: str) – Close every panel except the target panel. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • snap_panel(self, panel_id: str, mode: str) – Snap a panel to the workspace edges like a desktop window. Parameters: panel_id (type str); mode (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • toggle_panel_maximize(self, panel_id: str) – Toggle maximize or restore from a panel header. Parameters: panel_id (type str). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • auto_arrange(self) – Tile visible panels across the surface. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • cascade_panels(self) – Cascade visible panels diagonally like classic desktop windows. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • clamp_panels(self) – Reproject floating panels and keep snapped panels viewport-relative. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • serialize(self) – Return a serializable workspace snapshot. Returns: dict[str, object].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • restore(self, layout: dict[str, object] | None) – Hydrate panels from a saved layout. Parameters: layout (type dict[str, object] | None). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      modules\scenarios\gm_table_view.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Virtual tabletop style GM workspace.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        class GMTableView (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Freeform GM workspace with draggable panels.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • __init__(self, master, *, scenario_item: dict, root_app=None, layout_store: GMTableLayoutStore | None=None) – Parameters: master; scenario_item (keyword-only, type dict); root_app (keyword-only, default None); layout_store (keyword-only, type GMTableLayoutStore | None, default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _build_toolbar(self) – Build top controls. Returns: None.

Returns: tk.Menu.

Returns: tk.Menu.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _show_add_menu(self) – Open the add menu under the toolbar button. Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _persist_layout(self) – Persist the current table workspace after edits settle. Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • save_layout_now(self) – Persist immediately and notify the user. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • reset_table(self) – Reset the table workspace to the starter layout. Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Parameters: state (variadic keyword). Returns: dict.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        modules\scenarios\importers\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Importers package.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\scenarios\importers\random_table_text_parser.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Utilities for importing random tables from plain text definitions.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • parse_random_table_text(raw_text: str) – Parse raw text rows into random table entries. Supported line patterns are intentionally permissive so common table formats work out of the box (e.g., table entries from SRD-style PDFs or blog posts). Blank lines are ignored. Examples of accepted formats: - ``1-3 Result text`` - ``04–06: Result text`` (supports en dash and colon separator) - ``7 Result text`` - ``12. Result text`` (period or parenthesis after the number is allowed) Parameters: raw_text (type str). Returns: List[dict].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _split_name_and_description(text: str) – Internal helper for split name and description. Parameters: text (type str). Returns: tuple[str, str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _parse_single_line(line: str) – Parse single line. Parameters: line (type str). Returns: dict.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _build_entry(min_val: int, max_val: int, rest: str) – Build entry. Parameters: min_val (type int); max_val (type int); rest (type str). Returns: dict.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class RandomTableImportError (ValueError)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Raised when a random table import string cannot be parsed.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            modules\scenarios\plot_twist_panel.py

Returns: Optional[dict].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • _match_entry(table: dict, value: int) – Internal helper for match entry. Parameters: table (type dict); value (type int). Returns: dict.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • add_plot_twist_listener(listener: Callable[[PlotTwistResult], None]) – Handle add plot twist listener. Parameters: listener (type Callable[[PlotTwistResult], None]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • remove_plot_twist_listener(listener: Callable[[PlotTwistResult], None]) – Remove plot twist listener. Parameters: listener (type Callable[[PlotTwistResult], None]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • _notify_listeners(result: PlotTwistResult) – Notify listeners. Parameters: result (type PlotTwistResult). Returns: None.

Returns: Optional[PlotTwistResult].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • roll_plot_twist() – Handle roll plot twist. Returns: PlotTwistResult.

Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • to_payload(self) – Handle to payload. Returns: dict.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • __init__(self, master=None, *, compact: bool=False, show_title: bool=True, layout: str="default", **kwargs) – Initialize the PlotTwistPanel instance. Parameters: master (default None); compact (keyword-only, type bool, default False); show_title (keyword-only, type bool, default True); layout (keyword-only, type str, default "default"); kwargs (variadic keyword).

Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • _apply_result(self, result: PlotTwistResult) – Apply result. Parameters: result (type PlotTwistResult). Returns: None.

Parameters: result (type PlotTwistResult). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • roll_another(self) – Handle roll another. Returns: None.

Parameters: result (type PlotTwistResult). Returns: str.

Parameters: session_start (type datetime); mid_hours (type Optional[float]); end_hours (type Optional[float]); on_mid (type Callable[[], None]); on_end (type Callable[[], None]). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\scenarios\processing\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Processing package.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\scenarios\processing\ai_scenario_importer.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Import helpers for processing AI scenario.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • parse_json_relaxed(s: str) – Try to parse JSON from a possibly noisy AI response (module-level helper). Parameters: s (type str).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _clean_code_fence(text: str) – Internal helper for clean code fence. Parameters: text (type str). Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • request_outline(client, compressed_context: str, chunk_range_hint: str, source_label: str, multiple_scenarios: bool) – Handle request outline. Parameters: client; compressed_context (type str); chunk_range_hint (type str); source_label (type str); multiple_scenarios (type bool).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • expand_summary(client, title: str, summary_draft: str, compressed_context: str, chunk_range_hint: str) – Handle expand summary. Parameters: client; title (type str); summary_draft (type str); compressed_context (type str); chunk_range_hint (type str). Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • expand_scenes(client, title: str, outline_scenes, compressed_context: str, chunk_range_hint: str) – Handle expand scenes. Parameters: client; title (type str); outline_scenes; compressed_context (type str); chunk_range_hint (type str).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _normalise_scene_payload(scene_payload: dict) – Normalize AI scene payload into canonical structured scene fields. Parameters: scene_payload (type dict). Returns: dict.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • extract_entities(client, compressed_context: str, chunk_range_hint: str, stats_examples: list) – Extract entities. Parameters: client; compressed_context (type str); chunk_range_hint (type str); stats_examples (type list).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\scenarios\processing\chunking.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Utilities for processing chunking.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _strip_code_fences(text: str) – Internal helper for strip code fences. Parameters: text (type str). Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _chunk_words(words: List[str], start_offset: int, label_prefix: str, *, max_tokens: int) – Internal helper for chunk words. Parameters: words (type List[str]); start_offset (type int); label_prefix (type str); max_tokens (keyword-only, type int). Returns: Iterable[TextChunk].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • split_text_into_chunks(raw_text: str, *, max_tokens: int=800, page_delimiter: str="\f") – Split text by pages (if present) or fall back to fixed token windows. Parameters: raw_text (type str); max_tokens (keyword-only, type int, default 800); page_delimiter (keyword-only, type str, default "\f"). Returns: List[TextChunk].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • summarize_chunks(raw_text: str, client, source_label: str, *, max_tokens: int=800) – Summarize split chunks and stitch them for downstream prompts. Parameters: raw_text (type str); client; source_label (type str); max_tokens (keyword-only, type int, default 800). Returns: Tuple[str, List[dict]].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                class TextChunk

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class WizardStep (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Base class for wizard steps with state synchronization hooks.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • load_state(self, state) – Populate widgets using the shared wizard ``state``. Parameters: state.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • save_state(self, state) – Persist widget values into the shared wizard ``state``. Parameters: state.

Parameters: state.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • save_state(self, state) – Save state. Parameters: state.

Parameters: master; on_saved (default None); initial_scenario (keyword-only, default None); mode (keyword-only, default "standalone"); campaign_context (keyword-only, default None); arc_context (keyword-only, default None); on_embedded_result (keyword-only, default None); persist_on_finish (keyword-only, default False).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _resolve_tile(cache: TileCache, canvas, *, cache_key: str=_GRID_TILE_KEY) – Resolve tile. Parameters: cache (type TileCache); canvas; cache_key (keyword-only, type str, default _GRID_TILE_KEY). Returns: ImageTk.PhotoImage.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • apply_scene_flow_canvas_styling(canvas, *, tile_cache: TileCache, extent_width: int, extent_height: int, background_tags: Sequence[str]=("background", "scene_flow_bg"), cache_key: str=_GRID_TILE_KEY) – Configure the canvas with the shared grid background used by scene views. Parameters: canvas; tile_cache (keyword-only, type TileCache); extent_width (keyword-only, type int); extent_height (keyword-only, type int); background_tags (keyword-only, type Sequence[str], default ("background", "scene_flow_bg")); cache_key (keyword-only, type str, default _GRID_TILE_KEY). Returns: Optional[ImageTk.PhotoImage].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • draw_grid_background(canvas, tile: Optional[ImageTk.PhotoImage], extent_width: int, extent_height: int, tags: Sequence[str]=("background", "scene_flow_bg")) – Tile ``tile`` across the canvas within the provided extents. Parameters: canvas; tile (type Optional[ImageTk.PhotoImage]); extent_width (type int); extent_height (type int); tags (type Sequence[str], default ("background", "scene_flow_bg")). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • create_grid_tile(canvas, *, size: int=256, spacing: int=96, line_color=(255, 255, 255, 25), dot_color=(255, 255, 255, 40)) – Create a PhotoImage used for the tiled background grid. Parameters: canvas; size (keyword-only, type int, default 256); spacing (keyword-only, type int, default 96); line_color (keyword-only, default (255, 255, 255, 25)); dot_color (keyword-only, default (255, 255, 255, 40)). Returns: ImageTk.PhotoImage.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • get_shadow_image(canvas, cache: ShadowCache, width: int, height: int, scale: float) – Return a cached drop shadow sized for the given dimensions. Parameters: canvas; cache (type ShadowCache); width (type int); height (type int); scale (type float). Returns: Tuple[Optional[ImageTk.PhotoImage], int].

Parameters: parent; palette (type dict). Returns: None.

Returns: ctk.CTkFrame.

Parameters: master; scene; scene_types (keyword-only); on_save (keyword-only); on_cancel (keyword-only); width (keyword-only, default None); height (keyword-only, default None).

Parameters: scenes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\scenarios\wizard_steps\scenes\text_payloads.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Text payload normalization helpers for scenario scene editors.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • extract_plain_scene_text(value: Any) – Return user-facing plain text for scene Summary/Text payloads. Some historical payloads stored longtext values as a serialized dictionary string, e.g. ``"{'text': '...', 'formatting': {...}}"``. This helper detects those values and extracts the textual content so UI editors don't display raw Python/JSON structures. Parameters: value (type Any). Returns: str.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\ui\chatbot_dialog.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Campaign chatbot dialog with rich text rendering for entity notes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _coerce_formatting(data: Mapping[str, Any]) – Coerce formatting. Parameters: data (type Mapping[str, Any]). Returns: dict[str, list[tuple[int, int]]].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _from_rtf_json(value: Mapping[str, Any]) – Coerce a mapping that represents an RTF-JSON payload into RichTextValue. Supports common shapes found in the DB: - {"text": str, "formatting": {...}} - {"Text": str|dict, "formatting": {...}} (key casing varies) - {"Text": {"text": str, "formatting": {...}}} (nested payload) The last form appears for some Scenes rows; we unwrap it so the UI displays the inner text instead of a Python dict representation. Parameters: value (type Mapping[str, Any]). Returns: RichTextValue.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _parse_structured_text(raw: str) – Best-effort parsing for structured text serialized as JSON or Python literals. Parameters: raw (type str). Returns: Any | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _apply_line_prefix(value: RichTextValue, first_prefix: str, later_prefix: str | None=None) – Apply line prefix. Parameters: value (type RichTextValue); first_prefix (type str); later_prefix (type str | None, default None). Returns: RichTextValue.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • get_default_chatbot_wrappers() – Return default chatbot wrappers. Returns: dict[str, GenericModelWrapper].

Parameters: value (type Any). Returns: RichTextValue | None.

Parameters: text (type str). Returns: str.

Parameters: snippet (type str); match_pos (type int); query_len (type int); max_chars (type int). Returns: tuple[str, bool, bool].

Parameters: text (type str); match_index (type int); query_lower (type str); max_chars (keyword-only, type int, default 2000); fallback_window (keyword-only, type int, default 240). Returns: str.

Parameters: master (type tk.Misc | None); wrappers (keyword-only, type Mapping[str, GenericModelWrapper] | None, default None); name_field_overrides (keyword-only, type Mapping[str, str] | None, default None); note_field_candidates (keyword-only, type Iterable[str] | None, default None). Returns: ChatbotDialog.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class RichTextValue

Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • cleaned(self) – Handle cleaned. Returns: "RichTextValue".
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • clone(self) – Clone the operation. Returns: "RichTextValue".

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\ui\database_manager_dialog.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Modal dialog for selecting or creating campaign database files.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                class DatabaseManagerDialog (ctk.CTkToplevel)
