                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • create_icon_button(parent, icon, tooltip_text, command) – Create icon button. Parameters: parent; icon; tooltip_text; command.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\ui\icon_dropdown.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Utilities for icon dropdown.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class IconDropdown (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Compact dropdown that shows a grid of icon-only actions in a vertical list. Each option is represented by an icon and callback. The widget keeps the menu persistent (hidden when not in use) so callers can still access the underlying buttons for state updates.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • __init__(self, parent, items, default_key=None, button_size=(32, 32)) – Initialize the IconDropdown instance. Parameters: parent; items; default_key (default None); button_size (default (32, 32)).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • option_buttons(self) – Handle option buttons.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _build_menu(self) – Build menu.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  modules\ui\image_browser_dialog.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Dialog window that launches a webview for browsing free image libraries.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • __init__(self, master: tk.Misc | None=None, *, search_query: str="fantasy portrait", provider: str="unsplash") – Initialize the ImageBrowserDialog instance.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     • _build_ui(self) – Build UI. Returns: None.

Parameters: query (type str); provider (type str, default "unsplash"). Returns: str.

Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _load_initial_page(self) – Load initial page. Returns: None.

Returns: Any.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    modules\ui\image_library\browser_panel.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    High-performance image browsing panel with toolbar and virtualized rendering.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class VirtualWindow

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        class ImageBrowserPanel (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Image browser with debounce search, sorting, virtualization and cached thumbnails.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • __init__(self, parent, *, records: Iterable[ImageResult] | None=None, on_open: Callable[[ImageResult], None] | None=None, on_view: Callable[[ImageResult], None] | None=None, thumbnail_cache: ThumbnailCache | None=None, toolbar_state: ToolbarState | None=None, on_attach_to_entity: Callable[[ImageResult], None] | None=None, on_toolbar_state_changed: Callable[[ToolbarState], None] | None=None) – Parameters: parent; records (keyword-only, type Iterable[ImageResult] | None, default None); on_open (keyword-only, type Callable[[ImageResult], None] | None, default None); on_view (keyword-only, type Callable[[ImageResult], None] | None, default None); thumbnail_cache (keyword-only, type ThumbnailCache | None, default None); toolbar_state (keyword-only, type ToolbarState | None, default None); on_attach_to_entity (keyword-only, type Callable[[ImageResult], None] | None, default None); on_toolbar_state_changed (keyword-only, type Callable[[ToolbarState], None] | None, default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • set_records(self, records: Iterable[ImageResult]) – Replace records and refresh the browser. Parameters: records (type Iterable[ImageResult]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _on_widget_map(self, _event=None) – Retry canvas event binding when widget is mapped. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _ensure_scroll_bindings(self, retries: int=20, delay_ms: int=50) – Attach viewport-change bindings once scrollable canvas exists. Parameters: retries (type int, default 20); delay_ms (type int, default 50). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _bind_scrollbar_events(self) – Bind internal scrollbar drag events to keep virtualization in sync. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _on_scrollbar_button_press(self, _event=None) – Warm up rerender pipeline and start yview polling while dragging. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _on_scrollbar_drag_motion(self, _event=None) – Force rerender attempts while the scrollbar thumb is dragged. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _on_scrollbar_button_release(self, _event=None) – Stop polling and force a final rerender at drag end. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _start_scrollbar_position_poll(self) – Poll canvas yview during scrollbar interaction as a fallback hook. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _poll_scrollbar_position_change(self) – Trigger rerender when yview changes while scrollbar is being dragged. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _wrap_canvas_yview(self, canvas) – Wrap canvas yview to rerender after vertical scrollbar movement. Parameters: canvas. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _on_toolbar_changed(self, _state: ToolbarState) – Handle toolbar state updates. Parameters: _state (type ToolbarState). Returns: None.

Parameters: reset_scroll (keyword-only, type bool, default False). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _schedule_virtualized_render(self, force: bool=False) – Coalesce rapid UI events into one render pass. Parameters: force (type bool, default False). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _render_visible_subset(self) – Render only rows currently visible in viewport (with overscan). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _clear_rendered_cards(self) – Remove currently rendered widgets and image references. Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Dialogs for image library workflows.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\ui\image_library\dialogs\import_directories\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Directory import dialog support helpers.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            modules\ui\image_library\dialogs\import_directories\recent_roots_store.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Persistence for recent image import roots (campaign-local settings).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class RecentImportRootsStore

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Load/save campaign-local recent roots for quick reuse.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • __init__(self, *, get_setting: Callable[[str, str | None], str | None]=get_campaign_setting, set_setting: Callable[[str, str | None], None]=set_campaign_setting, limit: int=_DEFAULT_LIMIT) – Parameters: get_setting (keyword-only, type Callable[[str, str | None], str | None], default get_campaign_setting); set_setting (keyword-only, type Callable[[str, str | None], None], default set_campaign_setting); limit (keyword-only, type int, default _DEFAULT_LIMIT). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • load(self) – Return normalized recent roots from campaign settings. Returns: list[str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • save(self, roots: list[str]) – Persist normalized roots (most recent first). Parameters: roots (type list[str]). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\ui\image_library\dialogs\import_directories\root_selection.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Helpers for image import root selection and validation.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • normalize_roots(paths: Iterable[str]) – Normalize, trim, resolve, and dedupe root candidates preserving order. Parameters: paths (type Iterable[str]). Returns: list[str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • merge_roots(existing: Iterable[str], incoming: Iterable[str]) – Return normalized existing roots extended by incoming non-duplicates. Parameters: existing (type Iterable[str]); incoming (type Iterable[str]). Returns: list[str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • validate_roots(paths: Iterable[str]) – Partition normalized roots between existing and missing directories. Parameters: paths (type Iterable[str]). Returns: RootValidationResult.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class RootValidationResult

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Validated roots separated between existing and missing folders.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Dialog to import one or more filesystem directories into image assets.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • __init__(self, master: tk.Misc | None=None, *, service: ImageAssetsService | None=None, recent_roots_store: RecentImportRootsStore | None=None) – Parameters: master (type tk.Misc | None, default None); service (keyword-only, type ImageAssetsService | None, default None); recent_roots_store (keyword-only, type RecentImportRootsStore | None, default None). Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _clear(self) – Clear all selected roots. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _refresh_roots(self) – Refresh listbox from local roots list. Returns: None.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _on_drop_files(self, event: object) – Handle dropped file paths and add only directory roots.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     modules\ui\image_library\editor\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      modules\ui\image_library\editor\core\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Core editing primitives for the image editor dialog.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        modules\ui\image_library\editor\core\compositor.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • flatten_layers(width: int, height: int, layers: list[Layer]) – Composites all visible layers into a flattened RGBA image. Parameters: width (type int); height (type int); layers (type list[Layer]). Returns: Image.Image.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        modules\ui\image_library\editor\core\document.py

Returns: bool.

Returns: bool.

Returns: bool.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\ui\image_library\editor\core\render\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Rendering helpers for editor tools.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\ui\image_library\editor\core\render\stroke_renderer.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Raster stroke renderer for circular brush dabs.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class StrokeRenderer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Renders brush and eraser strokes onto RGBA layers.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • render_stroke(self, layer: Image.Image, start: tuple[float, float], end: tuple[float, float], *, size: float, opacity: float, hardness: float, color: tuple[int, int, int, int], erase: bool=False) – Parameters: layer (type Image.Image); start (type tuple[float, float]); end (type tuple[float, float]); size (keyword-only, type float); opacity (keyword-only, type float); hardness (keyword-only, type float); color (keyword-only, type tuple[int, int, int, int]); erase (keyword-only, type bool, default False). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _paint(self, layer: Image.Image, dab_mask: Image.Image, origin: tuple[int, int], color: tuple[int, int, int, int]) – Parameters: layer (type Image.Image); dab_mask (type Image.Image); origin (type tuple[int, int]); color (type tuple[int, int, int, int]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _erase(self, alpha_channel: Image.Image | None, dab_mask: Image.Image, origin: tuple[int, int]) – Parameters: alpha_channel (type Image.Image | None); dab_mask (type Image.Image); origin (type tuple[int, int]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _build_dab_mask(self, cx: float, cy: float, radius: float, hardness: float, opacity: float) – Parameters: cx (type float); cy (type float); radius (type float); hardness (type float); opacity (type float). Returns: tuple[Image.Image, tuple[int, int]].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • render_shape(self, layer: Image.Image, start: tuple[float, float], end: tuple[float, float], *, shape: str, color: tuple[int, int, int, int], opacity: float, stroke_width: float, constrain_proportions: bool=False) – Render a rectangle or ellipse outline based on drag bounds. Parameters: layer (type Image.Image); start (type tuple[float, float]); end (type tuple[float, float]); shape (keyword-only, type str); color (keyword-only, type tuple[int, int, int, int]); opacity (keyword-only, type float); stroke_width (keyword-only, type float); constrain_proportions (keyword-only, type bool, default False). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _shape_bounds(sx: float, sy: float, ex: float, ey: float, *, constrain_proportions: bool) – Parameters: sx (type float); sy (type float); ex (type float); ey (type float); constrain_proportions (keyword-only, type bool). Returns: tuple[float, float, float, float].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  modules\ui\image_library\editor\core\tools\__init__.py
