                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        modules\ui\image_library\editor\history\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        History utilities for image editor reversible command tracking.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\ui\image_library\editor\history\commands.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Reversible editing commands used by the image editor history stack.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • snapshot_document(document: ImageDocument) – Capture a deep copy snapshot of the current document. Parameters: document (type ImageDocument). Returns: DocumentState.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • apply_document_state(document: ImageDocument, state: DocumentState) – Restore a previously captured document snapshot. Parameters: document (type ImageDocument); state (type DocumentState). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class HistoryCommand (Protocol)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Protocol for reversible edit commands.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • execute(self) – Apply the command. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • undo(self) – Revert the command. Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class LayerState

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Serializable copy of a layer.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            class DocumentState

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Serializable snapshot of an entire document.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class SnapshotCommand

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Command that stores before/after document snapshots.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • __init__(self, document: ImageDocument, apply_mutation: Callable[[], None]) – Parameters: document (type ImageDocument); apply_mutation (type Callable[[], None]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • execute(self) – Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • undo(self) – Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class LayerPatchCommand

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Command for painting/erasing by replacing one layer image.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • __init__(self, document: ImageDocument, layer_index: int, before: Image.Image, after: Image.Image) – Parameters: document (type ImageDocument); layer_index (type int); before (type Image.Image); after (type Image.Image). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • execute(self) – Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • undo(self) – Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class StrokeCommand (LayerPatchCommand)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Reversible paint stroke command.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                class EraseCommand (LayerPatchCommand)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Reversible erase stroke command.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class ClearSelectionCommand (LayerPatchCommand)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Reversible command that clears pixels inside a selection mask.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • __init__(self, document: ImageDocument, layer_index: int, selection_mask: Image.Image) – Parameters: document (type ImageDocument); layer_index (type int); selection_mask (type Image.Image). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class CutSelectionCommand (LayerPatchCommand)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Clear selected pixels and store copied payload in the in-app clipboard.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • __init__(self, document: ImageDocument, layer_index: int, selection_mask: Image.Image, clipboard: SelectionClipboard) – Parameters: document (type ImageDocument); layer_index (type int); selection_mask (type Image.Image); clipboard (type SelectionClipboard). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • execute(self) – Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class PasteSelectionCommand (LayerPatchCommand)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • __init__(self, document: ImageDocument, layer_index: int, clipboard: SelectionClipboard) – Parameters: document (type ImageDocument); layer_index (type int); clipboard (type SelectionClipboard). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class FlipCommand (SnapshotCommand)

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Bounded undo/redo stack for image editor commands.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class HistoryStack

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Stores reversible commands with bounded depth.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • __init__(self, *, max_depth: int=50) – Parameters: max_depth (keyword-only, type int, default 50). Returns: None.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • redo(self) – Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • clear(self) – Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        modules\ui\image_library\editor\io\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Persistence and serialization services for the image editor.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\ui\image_library\editor\io\formats.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Format helpers for editor export/save operations.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • prepare_for_export(image: Image.Image, destination: Path) – Parameters: image (type Image.Image); destination (type Path). Returns: Image.Image.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\ui\image_library\editor\io\save_service.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Persistence service for image-editor save/export flows.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            class SaveService

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Centralized image persistence for editor document exports.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • save_image(self, image: Image.Image, target_path: str) – Parameters: image (type Image.Image); target_path (type str). Returns: Path.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            modules\ui\image_library\editor\selection\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Selection subsystem for the image editor.

Returns: None.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            modules\ui\image_library\result_card.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Reusable result card widget for image browsing.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Simple data object representing one image library item.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                class ImageResultCard (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Visual card that supports both list and grid layouts.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\ui\image_library\thumbnail_cache.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Thumbnail cache utilities for image browsing panels.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class ThumbnailCache

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Hybrid thumbnail cache with in-memory LRU and optional disk backing.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • __init__(self, *, max_items: int=512, disk_cache_dir: str | os.PathLike[str] | None=None, image_format: str="PNG") – Parameters: max_items (keyword-only, type int, default 512); disk_cache_dir (keyword-only, type str | os.PathLike[str] | None, default None); image_format (keyword-only, type str, default "PNG"). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • clear(self) – Clear in-memory cache only. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • get_thumbnail(self, source_path: str, size: tuple[int, int]) – Return a thumbnail image for the source path and requested size. Parameters: source_path (type str); size (type tuple[int, int]). Returns: Image.Image.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _remember(self, cache_key: str, image: Image.Image) – Store one entry in LRU memory cache. Parameters: cache_key (type str); image (type Image.Image). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _load_from_disk(self, cache_key: str) – Load a thumbnail from disk cache if available. Parameters: cache_key (type str). Returns: Image.Image | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _store_to_disk(self, cache_key: str, image: Image.Image) – Write a thumbnail to disk cache. Parameters: cache_key (type str); image (type Image.Image). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _disk_path(self, cache_key: str) – Return the disk path for a cache key. Parameters: cache_key (type str). Returns: Path | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _make_cache_key(self, *, source_path: str, size: tuple[int, int]) – Create deterministic cache key from path, mtime and size. Parameters: source_path (keyword-only, type str); size (keyword-only, type tuple[int, int]). Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _build_thumbnail(*, source_path: str, size: tuple[int, int]) – Generate thumbnail from source path. Parameters: source_path (keyword-only, type str); size (keyword-only, type tuple[int, int]). Returns: Image.Image.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class ThumbnailPlaceholderFactory

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Build reusable fallback images when a thumbnail cannot be loaded.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • build(size: tuple[int, int], text: str="No Preview") – Build a plain fallback image. Text rendering is intentionally omitted to avoid adding a hard dependency on platform fonts in headless testing environments. Parameters: size (type tuple[int, int]); text (type str, default "No Preview"). Returns: Image.Image.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  modules\ui\image_library\toolbar.py

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _on_search_key_release(self, _event=None) – Debounce user typing and emit a single consolidated change. Parameters: _event (default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _emit_change(self, immediate: bool=False) – Push toolbar state to callback. Parameters: immediate (type bool, default False). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • set_folder_choices(self, folder_names: list[str]) – Refresh available source-folder options while preserving selection when possible. Parameters: folder_names (type list[str]). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • state(self) – Expose latest toolbar state. Returns: ToolbarState.
