                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            modules\ui\video_background.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Video background rendering for map canvases. Decodes video frames with PyAV and updates the map's base image layer on the GM canvas, fullscreen canvas (if present), and exposes the latest frame for web rendering.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • is_video_path(path: str) – Return whether video path. Parameters: path (type str). Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • _calc_frame_delay_ms(stream) – Return a sensible per-frame delay for the video stream. Prefer the container's reported average frame rate; fall back to other hints. Clamp to a practical range to avoid extremely slow playback from bad metadata. Parameters: stream. Returns: int.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            class _StreamInfo

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class CanvasVideoBackgroundPlayer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Decode frames and paint them on the controller's canvases. Controller is expected to be an instance of DisplayMapController (or a compatible type) that has attributes: parent, canvas, base_id, base_tk, pan_x, pan_y, zoom, fs_canvas, fs_base_id, fs_base_tk, and a `_video_current_frame_pil` for web rendering.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • __init__(self, controller, path: str, *, loop: bool=True) – Initialize the CanvasVideoBackgroundPlayer instance. Parameters: controller; path (type str); loop (keyword-only, type bool, default True). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • size(self) – Handle size. Returns: tuple[int, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • start(self) – Start the operation. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • stop(self) – Stop the operation. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • _open_container(self) – Open container. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • _schedule(self) – Schedule the operation. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • _render_next(self) – Render next. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • _display_image(self, image: Image.Image) – Internal helper for display image. Parameters: image (type Image.Image). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\ui\video_player.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Utility helpers for displaying videos on the secondary monitor.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • play_video_on_second_screen(video_path: str, title: str | None=None) – Play the provided video on the secondary monitor. Parameters ---------- video_path: Absolute filesystem path to the video file to display. title: Optional window title to show while the video is playing. Parameters: video_path (type str); title (type str | None, default None). Returns: ctk.CTkToplevel.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class _MonitorBounds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                class _SecondScreenVideoPlayer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Simple video player that renders frames inside a fullscreen CTk window.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • __init__(self, video_path: str, title: str | None=None) – Initialize the _SecondScreenVideoPlayer instance. Parameters: video_path (type str); title (type str | None, default None). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _open_container(self, path: str) – Open container. Parameters: path (type str).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _get_video_stream(self) – Return video stream.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _calculate_frame_delay(self) – Internal helper for calculate frame delay. Returns: int.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _select_monitor(self) – Select monitor. Returns: _MonitorBounds.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _build_window(self, video_path: str, title: str | None, monitor: _MonitorBounds) – Build window. Parameters: video_path (type str); title (type str | None); monitor (type _MonitorBounds). Returns: ctk.CTkToplevel.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _render_next_frame(self) – Render next frame. Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • _display_image(self, image: Image.Image) – Internal helper for display image. Parameters: image (type Image.Image). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                • close(self, event=None) – Close the operation. Parameters: event (default None). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\ui\webview\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Helpers for launching embedded webviews.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  modules\ui\webview\pywebview_client.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • open(self, url: str, *, use_shell: bool=False, selection_output: str | None=None) – Open the operation. Parameters: url (type str); use_shell (keyword-only, type bool, default False); selection_output (keyword-only, type str | None, default None). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Standalone entrypoint for opening a pywebview window.

Returns: argparse.Namespace.

Parameters: window (type object). Returns: None.

Parameters: module_name (type str). Returns: bool.

Returns: bool.

Returns: bool.

Returns: bool.

Returns: str | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _default_storage_path() – Internal helper for default storage path. Returns: str.

Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • format_ai_prompt_for_humans(prompt_text: str | None) – Format serialized AI prompt text into a human-friendly structure. Input is expected to follow AIPipelineRunner.serialize_prompt format: [1:user] content [2:system] content Parameters: prompt_text (type str | None). Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • _format_content(content: str) – Format content. Parameters: content (type str). Returns: str.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            modules\whiteboard\controllers\whiteboard_controller.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Controller for whiteboard.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class WhiteboardController

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • __init__(self, parent, *, root_app=None) – Initialize the WhiteboardController instance. Parameters: parent; root_app (keyword-only, default None).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • _dispatch_to_ui_thread(self, func: Callable[[], Any]) – Ensure operations touching Tk widgets run on the UI thread. Remote whiteboard edits arrive on the Flask server thread; directly invoking Tk calls from there can crash the interpreter. We marshal the work back to the UI thread and block until completion to preserve the request/response flow. Parameters: func (type Callable[[], Any]).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • _refresh_viewport(self) – Refresh viewport.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              modules\whiteboard\models\layer_types.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Type definitions for whiteboard layer.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              • normalize_layer(value: str | None) – Normalize layer. Parameters: value (type str | None). Returns: str.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              class WhiteboardLayer (str, Enum)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                modules\whiteboard\services\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Whiteboard package.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  modules\whiteboard\services\whiteboard_history.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  History helpers for whiteboard.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    class WhiteboardHistory

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Track undo/redo history for whiteboard interactions.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • __init__(self, *, max_entries: int=50) – Initialize the WhiteboardHistory instance. Parameters: max_entries (keyword-only, type int, default 50).

Parameters: items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]).

Parameters: items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]).

Parameters: current_items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]). Returns: Tuple[List[Dict[str, Any]], bool].

Parameters: current_items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]). Returns: Tuple[List[Dict[str, Any]], bool].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • _clone(self, items: List[Dict[str, Any]]) – Clone the operation. Parameters: items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]). Returns: List[Dict[str, Any]].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class WhiteboardRepository

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Persist and fetch whiteboard states from the campaign database.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • __init__(self) – Initialize the WhiteboardRepository instance. Returns: None.

Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • save_snapshot(self, scenario_title: str, state: WhiteboardState) – Save snapshot. Parameters: scenario_title (type str); state (type WhiteboardState). Returns: Tuple[int, str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • load_latest_state(self, scenario_title: str) – Load latest state. Parameters: scenario_title (type str). Returns: Tuple[Optional[WhiteboardState], Optional[str]].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • list_history(self, scenario_title: str, limit: int=15) – Handle list history. Parameters: scenario_title (type str); limit (type int, default 15). Returns: List[WhiteboardSnapshot].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • load_snapshot(self, snapshot_id: int) – Load snapshot. Parameters: snapshot_id (type int). Returns: Optional[WhiteboardState].

Parameters: img (type Image.Image); grid_size (type int); line_color (keyword-only, type str, default "#e0e0e0"); origin (keyword-only, type Tuple[float, float], default (0.0, 0.0)); zoom (keyword-only, type float, default 1.0). Returns: Image.Image.

Parameters: canvas; viewport_size (type Tuple[int, int]); grid_size (type int); zoom (keyword-only, type float, default 1.0); pan (keyword-only, type Tuple[float, float], default (0.0, 0.0)); origin (keyword-only, type Tuple[float, float], default (0.0, 0.0)). Returns: None.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class RemoteAccessGuard

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Small helper to gate remote whiteboard edits behind a GM token and runtime toggle.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • __init__(self, *, enabled: bool=False, token: Optional[str]=None) – Initialize the RemoteAccessGuard instance. Parameters: enabled (keyword-only, type bool, default False); token (keyword-only, type Optional[str], default None).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • from_config(cls, enabled: bool=False) – Handle from config. Parameters: enabled (type bool, default False). Returns: "RemoteAccessGuard".
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • enabled(self) – Handle enabled. Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • token(self) – Handle token. Returns: str.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • set_enabled(self, value: bool) – Set enabled. Parameters: value (type bool). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • is_request_authorized(self, provided_token: Optional[str]) – Return whether request authorized. Parameters: provided_token (type Optional[str]). Returns: bool.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • _resolve_size(size: Tuple[int, int]) – Resolve size. Parameters: size (type Tuple[int, int]). Returns: Tuple[int, int].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • render_whiteboard_image(items: List[Dict[str, Any]], size: Tuple[int, int]=DEFAULT_SIZE, *, font_cache: TextFontCache | None=None, include_text: bool=True, text_scale: float=1.0, grid_enabled: bool=False, grid_size: int=50, grid_origin: Tuple[float, float]=(0.0, 0.0), for_player: bool=False, zoom: float=1.0) – Render whiteboard image. Parameters: items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]); size (type Tuple[int, int], default DEFAULT_SIZE); font_cache (keyword-only, type TextFontCache | None, default None); include_text (keyword-only, type bool, default True); text_scale (keyword-only, type float, default 1.0); grid_enabled (keyword-only, type bool, default False); grid_size (keyword-only, type int, default 50); grid_origin (keyword-only, type Tuple[float, float], default (0.0, 0.0)); for_player (keyword-only, type bool, default False); zoom (keyword-only, type float, default 1.0). Returns: Image.Image.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • render_png_bytes(items: List[Dict[str, Any]], size: Tuple[int, int]=DEFAULT_SIZE) – Render png bytes. Parameters: items (type List[Dict[str, Any]]); size (type Tuple[int, int], default DEFAULT_SIZE). Returns: bytes.
